message.content:
@startuml

box "Upstream" #LightBlue
participant "Producer" as UP <<C>>
participant "Adapter" as UA <<C>>
end box

participant "Tansport" as UT <<S>>

box "Gateway\nJobExecution" #LightBlue
participant "Adapter" as GA <<C>>
participant "Consumer" as GC <<C>>
participant "GatewayJobHandler" as GJH <<C>>
participant "Gateway" as GW <<C>>
end box

box "" #LightBlue
participant "Producer" as GP <<C>>
participant "Adapter" as GA2 <<C>>
end box

participant "Tansport" as DT <<S>>

box "Downstream" #LightBlue
participant "Adapter" as DA <<C>>
participant "Consumer" as DC <<C>>
end box

box "JobExecution" #LightBlue
participant "DownstreamJobHandler" as DJH <<C>>
end box

participant "Lower Layer" as LL <<S>>

UP -> UP : publish(command)
UP -> UA : publish(command)
UA -> UT : execute(command)
UA <-- UT : resolves()
UP <-- UA : resolves()
UP -> UP : subscribe(handler)
UA -> UA : subscribe("response")
UT -> GA : handler(command, done)
GA -> GJH : subscribe("done")
GA -> GJH : emit("command",\nGatewayJobHandler)
GJH -> GW : publish(command)
GW -> GA2 : publish(command)
GA2 -> DT : execute(command)
DT -> DC : handler(command, done)
DC -> DJH : subscribe("done")
DC -> DJH : emit("command",\nGatewayJobHandler)
DJH -> LL : done()
DJH --> DC : emit("done")
DC -> DT : done(response)
DT --> GA2 : resolves()
GW <-- GA2 : resolves()
GW -> GW : subscribe(handler)
GA2 -> GA2 : subscribe("response")
GA2 <-- DT : getDelay(command)
GA2 <-- DT : done(response)
GA2 -> GA2 : emit("response", response)
GA2 -> GA2 : handler("response")
GA2 -> GA2 : onTimeOut(getDelay())
GA2 -> GA2 : unsubscribe()
GW -> GW : resolve(responses)
GJH -> GJH : done()
GJH --> GC : emit("done")
GC -> GA : done(response)
GA -> UT : done(response)
UT --> UA : emit("response", response)
UA --> UA : handler("response")
UT --> UA : emit("response", response)
UA --> UA : handler("response")
UA -> UA : onTimeOut(getDelay())
UA -> UA : unsubscribe()
UT --> UA : getDelay(command)

@enduml
